steps.title: Use the conversion ratio
steps.content: The conversion is $3$ teaspoons per $1$ tablespoon. To convert teaspoons to tablespoons, divide by $3$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The equivalent amount is 17/3 tablespoons, about $5.67$ tablespoons. The answer is a little more than $5$ tablespoons because $15$ teaspoons equals exactly $5$ tablespoons.
